steps.title: Write the percent equation
steps.content:
The table gives group A as $375$ objects and group C as $690$ objects. The statement means
$$690=\frac{p}{100}\cdot375$$

steps.title: Solve for the percent
steps.content:
Divide by $375$ and multiply by $100$:
$$p=\frac{690}{375}\cdot100=184$$
The answer is 184.
